title: Data Proof Story
description: A data-led case-study template with count-up proof, animated bars, insight labels, and a confident conclusion.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition inspired by HyperFrames data chart, map, shimmer, and lower-third patterns.

applyChecklist: Replace the metric, label, insight, and source with verified data from the brief.
Keep chart values proportional and let the count-up land before the conclusion appears.
Use the accent variable for the primary bar, highlight, and key insight only.
Verify that the source label remains readable and that no claim is invented by decoration.
